title: Conservator of the peace
doc_html:
§5702.  Conservator of the peace

The coroner shall be a conservator of the peace.

Amended by Acts 1952, No. 151, §2.  Acts 1984, No. 570, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 33:1552 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.
